Supplement.Name: Vitamin D3
Supplement.Rationale: Bone health; low sun exposure in winter months; supports prediabetes management

Supplement.Name: Fish Oil Omega-3
Supplement.Rationale: Cardiovascular; anti-inflammatory support for plantar fasciitis per Dr. Richter

Supplement.Name: Magnesium Glycinate
Supplement.Rationale: Sleep quality; muscle recovery post-ride; leg cramp prevention
